prompt: Build me a todo list component in Svelte 5. I want $state for the todos array, $derived to compute how many are left, and I want to use snippets so the consumer can customize how each row renders. Include a text input to add new todos and a toggle for each one.

assertions.text: Uses $derived() or $derived.by() to compute remaining/incomplete count
Defines or accepts a Snippet type (imports from 'svelte')
Uses onclick handler (not on:click Svelte 4 syntax)
Includes a text input for adding new todos
Has a toggle mechanism (checkbox or button) per todo
